ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Validate Solution for Core services.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT(RecordType.Name = "Growth Opportunity") && NOT(RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity") && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Validate Solution") && (ISPICKVAL(Data_Extract_Received__c,"")|| ISNULL(Proposal_Financial_Terms__c) || ISNULL(Proposal_Date__c)|| ISNULL(Revenue__c)|| ISNULL(Total_CORE_Operating_Margin__c)|| ISNULL(Volume__c)|| ISNULL(Subsidy__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Proposal Financial Terms, Data Extract Received, Proposal Date, Patient Collections, Total Margin, Annual Encounters, and Subsidy.
